title: Salty Velvety Indulgent Flaxseed Korean Stir-fry
description: A diabetic-friendly polish dish featuring flaxseed, providing a blend of salty and velvety textures with an indulgent flavor profile that’s perfect for breakfast.

ingredients.name: 1 cup gluten-free rice
ingredients.notes: Use a low glycemic index variety if available

ingredients.name: 2 cups vegetable broth
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's low-sodium or use a dash of salt to taste

ingredients.name: 1 teaspoon ginger paste (or finely chopped fresh ginger)
2 cups mixed vegetables (e.g., bell peppers, mushrooms, onions, carrots)

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and ginger paste, sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Stir in soy sauce and flaxseed, mix well to combine.
Pour in vegetable broth, bring to a boil, then reduce heat to maintain simmer.
Add mixed vegetables, stir-fry until they are slightly softened but still retain some crunch (about 5-7 minutes).
Adjust seasoning with salt if needed. Add lemon juice for extra zing (optional).
Garnish with shredded coconut before serving.
